mq2.description: Smoke / combustible gas (LPG, butane, smoke). Higher = worse.

mq135.description: Air quality (NH3, NOx, CO2-equivalent, smoke). Higher = worse.

flame.description: IR flame sensor - binary detection, any flame = immediate critical

bme280.description: Ambient temperature/humidity. High temp + low humidity = elevated fire risk.

soil.description: Soil/ground moisture around the monitored area. Dry ground raises fire spread risk.

wind.description: Wind speed - strong wind accelerates fire spread risk.

alarm.note: Critical alarm only fires after N consecutive critical readings, to filter sensor noise/false positives. Cooldown prevents repeated Telegram/MQTT spam for the same ongoing event.
